title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 23 May 2024.

items.title: Returning **MultiVersus **beta players will receive free premium battle pass
bullets: Users who played in the previous "beta" will have to login by June 11th to claim
In addition, any returning players will receive a special edition Snow Suit Finn character variant, a special edition Rising Stars ringout, and a special edition Banana Guard announcer pack.

items.title: **Relic **partners with investment firm to go fully indie again
bullets: The Vancouver studio split from Sega Europe in late March and has now secured funding to stay indie for the foreseeable future.
It's entered a partnership with investment firm Emona Capital that will let it "return to its roots."

items.title: **Helldivers 2** developer Arrowhead names former Paradox exec as new CEO
bullets: Former Paradox Interactive chief business development officer Shams Jorjani has joined the Swedish studio to oversee business operations
Outgoing CEO Johan Pilestedt will remain with the studio as chief creative officer and explained the switch will enable him to spend more time with the dev team.
